name: Falco
description: The cloud-native runtime security tool — detects anomalous activity, privilege escalations, and namespace violations in your containers and host in real-time. Installs Falco along with Falcosidekick and a web dashboard.

setup_commands.command: helm repo add falcosecurity https://falcosecurity.github.io/charts --force-update && helm repo update falcosecurity
setup_commands.label: Adding Falco Helm repo

setup_commands.command: helm upgrade --install falco falcosecurity/falco --version 9.1.0 --namespace falco --create-namespace --set tty=true --set falcosidekick.enabled=true --set falcosidekick.webui.enabled=true --set falcosidekick.webui.disableauth=true --wait --timeout 15m
setup_commands.label: Installing Falco and Falcosidekick
